headline: Elevance Health (ELV) Could Be Fully Valued After Lower Earnings And Revenue Forecasts
summary: Recent analyst forecasts pointing to lower quarterly earnings of $6.18 per share and decreasing revenue expectations have put Elevance Health (ELV) in focus. Investors are reassessing the stock after these projections surfaced. See our latest analysis for Elevance Health. Despite the cautious earnings outlook, Elevance Health’s share price has climbed 33.61% over the past 90 days and delivered a 24.75% total shareholder return over the last year, suggesting recent momentum remains firmly...
